title: Implement transcript_2 with correct CBOR encoding for TH_2 per RFC 9528 and Python reference
description: Add fn transcript_2(g_y: &[u8], msg1: &[u8]) -> Result<[u8;32], EdhocError> that computes H(G_Y || H(message_1)) or correct CBOR equivalent to match test vectors and Python edhoc.py. Use compute_th helper.
